title: Aiouea zapatae
intro: Aiouea zapatae, also known as Zapata's aiouea, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae that is native to the Amazon rainforest. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Aiouea zapatae include sesquiterpenes, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with Aiouea zapatae include teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as extracts and essential oils, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
